response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) that directly matches the role. Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) and architectural breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems. Gaps around Nest.js and Kotlin/Java depth are minor relative to the overall fit.
strengths: Direct recent experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, and MongoDB at Optilyz and re:cinq
Active work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators aligns with the AI agent development requirement
Deep software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and proven architecture skills
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java work; Java experience dates back to Altom (2016-2018)
Vitest specifically not called out, though Jest/testing expertise is implied through TDD focus
